title: Connect
text:
NAVAIR Connect Mobile App Now Available!
Stay Connected with the latest local and enterprise-wide news, messages, videos and podcasts directly on your mobile device!
With three easy steps, you can CONNECT today!
STEP 1: Activate Your Account
STEP 2: Download and Login
STEP 3: Sign Up for Notifications
To activate your account, follow these steps:
Use this link to access your NAVAIR Connect Mobile Application Account. In case hyperlinks don't work on your device, copy and paste the following URL: https://navair.appiancloud.com/
Select Forgot your password?
Enter your Navy email address (example: navair.a.user@us.navy.mil) as your username.
Hit Send Email
You’ll get a confirmation screen like the one to the right, and you will be sent an email from NAVAIR Connect.
Enter a new password and confirm. Click Submit.
A new window will open, and you now have access to your Connect app account.
Proceed to the Next Step.
Once you’re finished setting up your account by resetting your password, use your personal cell phone or other personal mobile device to download the Connect app from the Apple App Store or Google Play Store.
Use the links below to download the app off the app store for your device.
Once you have the app on your device, you will be able to login.
If prompted for a server address, enter this URL - navair.appiancloud.com
Enter your username, which is your Navy email address (example: navair.a.user@us.navy.mil)
Enter the password you just created in Step 1.
Proceed to the Next Step.
Note: If you do not receive an email to reset your password, contact the Connect team at: navairpao@us.navy.mil
Now that you have the app downloaded, sign up for notifications to stay in the know wherever you go!
Apple Users
On your iPhone or iPad, go to Settings.
Select Notifications.
Under Notification Style, select NAVAIR Connect.
Make sure Allow Notifications is enabled and select how you'd like your alerts to appear!
Android Users
On your Android device, go to Settings.
Select Notifications.
Select App Settings.
Select NAVAIR Connect.
Make sure All NAVAIR Connect notifications are enabled and select the frequency for how you'd like your alerts to appear!

To activate your account, follow these steps:
Use this link to access your NAVAIR Connect Mobile Application Account. In case hyperlinks don't work on your device, copy and paste the following URL: https://navair.appiancloud.com/
Select Forgot your password?
Enter your Navy email address (example: navair.a.user@us.navy.mil) as your username.
Hit Send Email
You’ll get a confirmation screen like the one to the right, and you will be sent an email from NAVAIR Connect.
Enter a new password and confirm. Click Submit.
A new window will open, and you now have access to your Connect app account.
Proceed to the Next Step.
STEP 2: Download and Login
Once you’re finished setting up your account by resetting your password, use your personal cell phone or other personal mobile device to download the Connect app from the Apple App Store or Google Play Store.
Use the links below to download the app off the app store for your device.
Once you have the app on your device, you will be able to login.
If prompted for a server address, enter this URL - navair.appiancloud.com
Enter your username, which is your Navy email address (example: navair.a.user@us.navy.mil)
Enter the password you just created in Step 1.
Proceed to the Next Step.
Note: If you do not receive an email to reset your password, contact the Connect team at: navairpao@us.navy.mil
STEP 3: Sign Up for Notifications
Now that you have the app downloaded, sign up for notifications to stay in the know wherever you go!
Apple Users
On your iPhone or iPad, go to Settings.
Select Notifications.
Under Notification Style, select NAVAIR Connect.
Make sure Allow Notifications is enabled and select how you'd like your alerts to appear!
Android Users
On your Android device, go to Settings.
Select Notifications.
Select App Settings.
Select NAVAIR Connect.
Make sure All NAVAIR Connect notifications are enabled and select the frequency for how you'd like your alerts to appear!
Your News, Your Way
Your NAVAIR Connect account is connected to your Navy.mil profile -- which means you'll get localized command information on-the-go!
